name: California Raisin Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Stir in the raisins to coat with the flour mixture.
3. Pour in the milk and stir just until moistened. Do not overmix.
4. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan and spread the batter in the pan.
5. Combine water, brown sugar, and margarine in a saucepan. Heat just until the margarine melts and the sugar is dissolved. Carefully pour over the batter in the baking pan. Do not stir.
6. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 30-40 minutes. Serve while warm topped with whipped cream if desired. Add a dash of cinnamon to the sweetened whipped cream if desired.
